query: INSERT INTO users (id, openId, name, email, loginMethod, role, hourly_rate, currency, rate_updated_at, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn) VALUES (999, 'test-user', 'Test User', 'test@example.com', 'test', 'user', '50.00', 'USD', NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE lastSignedIn = NOW();
